titleStmt.title: SII 9.121: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 121. (A.R. No. 11 of 1928.) ON A STONE PLANTED IN THE MALLESVARA TEMPLE AT SIVAPURA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 980, Viḷambi, Vaiśākha, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra corresponding probably to A.D. 1057 April 21, Monday and refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva. On the occasion of a visit to the Mallikārjuna temple paid by his chief queen Maiḷaladēvī and Ballavarasa, the king is said to have made a gift of Śivapura and other villages for the service of the god Bhairavadēva, maintenance of a satra (free feeding house) and for vidyādāna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivirddhi
pravarddhamānamāca(ṁ)ndrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire tatpādapa
dmōpajīvigaḷappa svastyanava
rataparamakalyāṇābhyuda
yaśahaśraphaḷabhōgabhāgi
ṇi dvitīyalakṣmī viḷāsavi
dyādhari dānacintāmaṇi savu
timadabhaṁjane samastāṁta
®puramukhamaṁḍane śrī
matraiḷōkyamalladēvaviśāḷa
vakṣasthaḻanivāsiniyarappa
śrīmatpiriyarasi maiḻa
ladēviyaru śrīballavara
saruṁ śrīmanmallikārjunadēvara
ge bijayaṁgeydalli

ślōkaṁ . siddhasya trīṇi cihnasya
dhātā bhōktā na yācakaḥ maṇḍa
ḷikanarē(ṁ)ndrēṇāṁ kiṁkurvvaṇavidhī
yatē . laukikācāranirmmaktaṁ
yōgacārabivarjjitaṁ niṣkaḷā
cārasaṁpanna nirācāra sa
yucyatē . © sakavarṣa 980
neya viḷaṁbisavatsarada vai
sākha puṁṇame sōmavāra
vyatīpātadaṁdu śrīmatrai
ḷōkyamalladēvaru tapōdhana
rggaṁ vāriśatrakkaṁ vidyādānani
mityadiṁ mallikārjjunadē
vara paścimadvāra Ādibhaira
vadēvarggaṁ sanda grāmaṁ kannenā
ḍoḷagaṇa śivapuraṁ Adaṟa
praviṣṭabāḍaṁ jāvuṭūru Ā
baḷiya kalgōṭu Intīyūrgga
ḷaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭar
śivāpurada polamēre pū
rvvadiśābāgadoḷ kalmaḍuvuṁ
koṁmadiceṟuvuṁ Āgnēyadoḷe
ṟeya bāguṁ Eṟaṁdoppevuṁ

jāvuṭūriṁ dakṣiṇa kaḍavina ko
ḍivuṁ Ippayabāgu nairityado
ḷu bidirapaḷavuṁ palmakuḍivuṁ
paḍuva pūvinakeṟeyuṁ bu
rulabāguṁ vāyuvyadoḷ pāpi
yasaṟiyuṁ baḍagalu vēli
vidiruṁ Īśānyadoḷ kapāḷē
śvaraṁ kalgoṭla polada sīme
mūḍa kākalēṟu Āgnēyada
lu soḷakūḍala paḻḷamuṁ
teṁkaṇa sīme bēvina bha
gavatiyuṁ nairityada sīme
rāvikuṁṭi paḍuvaṇasīme
jakkiseṭṭiyakeṟe vāyāvya
dalu hūliyakeṟe baḍagaṇa
sīme bhagavatiyakeṟe Ī
śānyada sīme nēṟilakūḍala
paḷḷa . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasu(ṁ)ndharāṁ śaṣṭirvvari
ṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi[ḥ.*] . sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmasētu(ṁ)rnripāṇāṁ kālē
kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ
śarbbānētāṁ bhāgina pārtthivēṁ
dra bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadra[ḥ.*]
Digital edition of SII 9.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
